examples.en: The presentation of the project was very clear.

examples.es: Debemos preparar una presentación para los nuevos clientes mañana.
examples.en: We must prepare a presentation for the new clients tomorrow.

examples.es: El director quedó impresionado con tu presentación durante la reunión.
examples.en: The manager was impressed with your presentation during the meeting.

cards.example_sentence: The presentation of the project was very clear.
cards.example_es: La presentación del proyecto fue muy clara.
cards.example_en: The presentation of the project was very clear.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a presenter opening a gift box labeled presentación on stage

cards.definition_en: A single page of a presentation, typically shown on a screen.

examples.es: La diapositiva muestra los resultados del experimento.
examples.en: The slide shows the results of the experiment.

examples.es: Por favor, añade una diapositiva nueva para explicar el presupuesto del proyecto.
examples.en: Please add a new slide to explain the project budget.

examples.es: El orador cambió a la siguiente diapositiva durante la presentación de ventas.
examples.en: The speaker moved to the next slide during the sales presentation.

cards.example_sentence: The slide shows the results of the experiment.
cards.example_es: La diapositiva muestra los resultados del experimento.
cards.example_en: The slide shows the results of the experiment.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a playground slide built from a huge Diapositiva picture you can glide down.

cards.definition_en: A plan or suggestion put forward for consideration or discussion.

examples.es: La propuesta del comité fue aprobada por unanimidad.
examples.en: The committee's proposal was approved unanimously.

examples.es: Debemos enviar la propuesta antes de que finalice el plazo de licitación.
examples.en: We must submit the proposal before the bidding deadline ends.

examples.es: El cliente solicitó cambios importantes en nuestra propuesta inicial.
examples.en: The client requested major changes to our initial proposal.

cards.example_sentence: The committee's proposal was approved unanimously.
cards.example_es: La propuesta del comité fue aprobada por unanimidad.
cards.example_en: The committee's proposal was approved unanimously.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a pro chef posing a proposal on a propuesta menu.

cards.definition_en: A document itemizing goods or services provided and requesting payment.

examples.es: Necesito que me envíes la factura antes del viernes.
examples.en: I need you to send me the invoice before Friday.

examples.es: El departamento de contabilidad rechazó la factura porque faltaba el número de pedido.
examples.en: The accounting department rejected the invoice because the purchase order number was missing.

examples.es: Por favor, adjunta la factura al correo electrónico para que podamos procesar el pago.
examples.en: Please attach the invoice to the email so that we can process the payment.

cards.example_sentence: I need you to send me the invoice before Friday.
cards.example_es: Necesito que me envíes la factura antes del viernes.
cards.example_en: I need you to send me the invoice before Friday.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a loud voice shouting the invoice amount, en voz, the bill appears.

cards.definition_en: A document issued by a buyer to a seller specifying the items, quantities, and agreed prices for a purchase.

examples.es: Necesito enviar la orden de compra al proveedor antes del viernes.
examples.en: I need to send the purchase order to the supplier before Friday.

examples.es: El departamento de contabilidad rechazó la orden de compra porque faltaba la firma del gerente.
examples.en: The accounting department rejected the purchase order because the manager's signature was missing.

examples.es: Por favor, adjunta la orden de compra al correo electrónico para que podamos procesar el pago.
examples.en: Please attach the purchase order to the email so that we can process the payment.

cards.example_sentence: I need to send the purchase order to the supplier before Friday.
cards.example_es: Necesito enviar la orden de compra al proveedor antes del viernes.
cards.example_en: I need to send the purchase order to the supplier before Friday.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a purchase order as a clipboard with the word 'orden' printed on a shopping list.

cards.definition_en: A repayment of money that has been spent or lost, typically to cover incurred expenses.

examples.es: Solicité el reembolso de mi compra porque el producto estaba defectuoso.
examples.en: I requested the reimbursement for my purchase because the product was defective.

examples.es: Por favor, adjunta todos los recibos de tus gastos de viaje para procesar tu reembolso.
examples.en: Please attach all your travel receipts so we can process your reimbursement.

examples.es: La empresa ofrece un reembolso completo si cancelas tu suscripción antes de fin de mes.
examples.en: The company offers a full reimbursement if you cancel your subscription before the end of the month.

cards.example_sentence: I requested the reimbursement for my purchase because the product was defective.
cards.example_es: Solicité el reembolso de mi compra porque el producto estaba defectuoso.
cards.example_en: I requested the reimbursement for my purchase because the product was defective.
cards.mnemonic_en: When the REEMBURSING elf hands you a REEMBOLSO, you get a reimbursement.

cards.definition_en: A period of time when an employee is permitted to be absent from work due to illness.

examples.es: Debido a una intervención quirúrgica programada, el empleado deberá tramitar una baja médica de larga duración.
examples.en: Due to a scheduled surgical procedure, the employee will need to apply for long-term sick leave.

examples.es: Debido a una gripe fuerte, he solicitado una baja médica para recuperarme en casa.
examples.en: Due to a bad flu, I have requested a sick leave to recover at home.

examples.es: Mi compañera no vendrá a la oficina esta semana porque está de baja médica.
examples.en: My colleague will not come to the office this week because she is on sick leave.

cards.example_sentence: Due to a scheduled surgical procedure, the employee will need to apply for long-term sick leave.
cards.example_es: Debido a una intervención quirúrgica programada, el empleado deberá tramitar una baja médica de larga duración.
cards.example_en: Due to a scheduled surgical procedure, the employee will need to apply for long-term sick leave.
cards.mnemonic_en: When you feel baja, the medic says take sick leave.

cards.definition_en: Paid time off from work that an employee is entitled to each year.

examples.es: Voy a tomar mis vacaciones la próxima semana.
examples.en: I am going to take my annual leave next week.

examples.es: Debes enviar tu solicitud de vacaciones al departamento de recursos humanos antes de fin de mes.
examples.en: You must submit your annual leave request to the human resources department before the end of the month.

examples.es: El gerente aprobó mis vacaciones para el mes de agosto.
examples.en: The manager approved my annual leave for the month of August.

cards.example_sentence: I am going to take my annual leave next week.
cards.example_es: Voy a tomar mis vacaciones la próxima semana.
cards.example_en: I am going to take my annual leave next week.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a yearly vacation where a giant leaf falls, reminding you of annual leave during vacaciones.

cards.definition_en: A period of time when someone is permitted to be away from work or school.
collocations: apply for a leave of absence

examples.es: Solicité un permiso de ausencia para poder atender a mi familia.
examples.en: I requested a leave of absence to take care of my family.

examples.es: Debido a una condición médica, mi doctor me recomendó pedir un permiso de ausencia prolongado.
examples.en: Due to a medical condition, my doctor recommended that I take a leave of absence.

examples.es: El departamento de recursos humanos aprobó mi permiso de ausencia para realizar estudios de posgrado.
examples.en: The human resources department approved my leave of absence to pursue postgraduate studies.

cards.example_sentence: I requested a leave of absence to take care of my family.
cards.example_es: Solicité un permiso de ausencia para poder atender a mi familia.
cards.example_en: I requested a leave of absence to take care of my family.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a leaf drifting away when you get a permiso de ausencia.

cards.definition_en: A designated span of time during which an employee's performance is evaluated before confirming permanent employment.

examples.es: El nuevo empleado comenzará su período de prueba la próxima semana.
examples.en: The new employee will start his probation period next week.

examples.es: Durante el período de prueba, el supervisor evaluará el desempeño del candidato.
examples.en: During the probation period, the supervisor will evaluate the candidate's performance.

examples.es: Si superas con éxito el período de prueba, recibirás un contrato indefinido.
examples.en: If you successfully complete the probation period, you will receive a permanent contract.

cards.example_sentence: The new employee will start his probation period next week.
cards.example_es: El nuevo empleado comenzará su período de prueba la próxima semana.
cards.example_en: The new employee will start his probation period next week.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a probation officer handing a test (prueba) for the new period.

cards.definition_en: A target or objective set to be achieved within a three-month period.

examples.es: Nuestro objetivo trimestral es aumentar las ventas en un 10 %.
examples.en: Our quarterly goal is to increase sales by 10%.

examples.es: El equipo de marketing no logró alcanzar su objetivo trimestral debido a problemas presupuestarios.
examples.en: The marketing team failed to reach their quarterly goal due to budget issues.

examples.es: Debemos revisar el progreso del proyecto para asegurar que cumplimos con nuestro objetivo trimestral.
examples.en: We must review the project progress to ensure we meet our quarterly goal.

cards.example_sentence: Our quarterly goal is to increase sales by 10%.
cards.example_es: Nuestro objetivo trimestral es aumentar las ventas en un 10 %.
cards.example_en: Our quarterly goal is to increase sales by 10%.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a goalpost with four quarters, each showing three months—your quarterly goal.

cards.definition_en: A measurable value that shows how effectively an organization is achieving its key objectives.

examples.es: El indicador clave de rendimiento de la empresa muestra una mejora del 15% en la productividad.
examples.en: The company's key performance indicator shows a 15% improvement in productivity.

examples.es: Debemos revisar el indicador clave de rendimiento antes de presentar los resultados trimestrales a los inversores.
examples.en: We must review the key performance indicator before presenting the quarterly results to the investors.

examples.es: El equipo de marketing definió un nuevo indicador clave de rendimiento para medir el éxito de la campaña digital.
examples.en: The marketing team defined a new key performance indicator to measure the success of the digital campaign.

cards.example_sentence: The company's key performance indicator shows a 15% improvement in productivity.
cards.example_es: El indicador clave de rendimiento de la empresa muestra una mejora del 15% en la productividad.
cards.example_en: The company's key performance indicator shows a 15% improvement in productivity.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a key (clave) unlocking a performance gauge that indicates success.

cards.definition_en: A result that can be quantified or assessed.

examples.es: El gerente solicitó un resultado medible para justificar la inversión en esta nueva herramienta.
examples.en: The manager requested a measurable outcome to justify the investment in this new tool.

examples.es: Debemos definir un resultado medible antes de comenzar la fase de implementación del software.
examples.en: We must define a measurable outcome before starting the software implementation phase.

examples.es: La falta de un resultado medible dificultó la presentación de los avances ante la junta directiva.
examples.en: The lack of a measurable outcome made it difficult to present the progress to the board of directors.

cards.example_sentence: The manager requested a measurable outcome to justify the investment in this new tool.
cards.example_es: El gerente solicitó un resultado medible para justificar la inversión en esta nueva herramienta.
cards.example_en: The manager requested a measurable outcome to justify the investment in this new tool.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a measuring tape saying measurable like the Spanish medible on a result board.

cards.definition_en: The process of developing skills, knowledge, and experience in one's career.

examples.es: El crecimiento profesional depende de la capacitación continua.
examples.en: Professional growth depends on continuous training.

examples.es: Mi jefe me ofreció un mentor para fomentar mi crecimiento profesional.
examples.en: My manager offered me a mentor to foster my professional growth.

examples.es: La empresa ofrece varios talleres diseñados para impulsar el crecimiento profesional de sus empleados.
examples.en: The company offers several workshops designed to boost the professional growth of its employees.

cards.example_sentence: Professional growth depends on continuous training.
cards.example_es: El crecimiento profesional depende de la capacitación continua.
cards.example_en: Professional growth depends on continuous training.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a professional planting a crescent‑shaped seed that sprouts tall, showing professional growth.

cards.definition_en: The process of identifying and choosing among alternatives.

examples.es: La toma de decisiones es crucial en la gestión de proyectos.
examples.en: Decision-making is crucial in project management.

examples.es: El equipo necesita mejorar su proceso de toma de decisiones para evitar retrasos.
examples.en: The team needs to improve its decision-making process to avoid delays.

examples.es: Ella tiene mucha experiencia en la toma de decisiones bajo presión durante las crisis.
examples.en: She has a lot of experience in decision-making under pressure during crises.

cards.example_sentence: Decision-making is crucial in project management.
cards.example_es: La toma de decisiones es crucial en la gestión de proyectos.
cards.example_en: Decision-making is crucial in project management.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a judge pulling a huge lever labeled Decision while shouting Toma de decisiones!

cards.definition_en: To give official permission or authority to someone to perform an action.

examples.es: El gerente debe autorizar el gasto antes de que se realice.
examples.en: The manager must authorize the expense before it is made.

examples.es: Necesito que el director venga a autorizar el acceso a los archivos confidenciales.
examples.en: I need the director to come and authorize access to the confidential files.

examples.es: Solo el supervisor tiene el poder de autorizar las horas extra del equipo.
examples.en: Only the supervisor has the power to authorize the team's overtime hours.

cards.example_sentence: The manager must authorize the expense before it is made.
cards.example_es: El gerente debe autorizar el gasto antes de que se realice.
cards.example_en: The manager must authorize the expense before it is made.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an author stamping his book, saying autor, and granting permission – he authorizes.

cards.definition_en: To distribute or assign resources to particular tasks or purposes.

examples.es: El gerente decidió asignar recursos al proyecto de investigación.
examples.en: The manager decided to allocate resources to the research project.

examples.es: Debemos asignar recursos adicionales para cumplir con la fecha de entrega del cliente.
examples.en: We must allocate resources to meet the client's deadline.

examples.es: El departamento de finanzas se encarga de asignar recursos a cada departamento según sus necesidades.
examples.en: The finance department is responsible to allocate resources to each department based on their needs.

cards.example_sentence: The manager decided to allocate resources to the research project.
cards.example_es: El gerente decidió asignar recursos al proyecto de investigación.
cards.example_en: The manager decided to allocate resources to the research project.
cards.mnemonic_en: Allocate resources by assigning her a pile of tools.

cards.definition_en: To continue doing something in the correct direction or according to a plan.
collocations: stay on track with your goals
stay on track during the meeting
stay on track and avoid setbacks

examples.es: Debemos enfocarnos en los objetivos principales para mantener el rumbo durante esta reunión.
examples.en: We must focus on the main objectives to stay on track during this meeting.

examples.es: El gerente nos recordó que es vital mantener el rumbo para terminar el proyecto a tiempo.
examples.en: The manager reminded us that it is vital to stay on track to finish the project on time.

examples.es: Aunque surgieron nuevos problemas, logramos mantener el rumbo gracias a una buena planificación.
examples.en: Even though new problems arose, we managed to stay on track thanks to good planning.

cards.example_sentence: We must focus on the main objectives to stay on track during this meeting.
cards.example_es: Debemos enfocarnos en los objetivos principales para mantener el rumbo durante esta reunión.
cards.example_en: We must focus on the main objectives to stay on track during this meeting.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a train saying 'está en track' while it keeps the rumbo.

cards.definition_en: To deviate from the intended plan or course.
collocations: go off track during a meeting
go off track with the project

examples.es: No debemos desviarnos del plan durante la presentación de resultados.
examples.en: We must not go off track during the results presentation.

examples.es: Si empezamos a discutir temas personales, vamos a desviarnos del plan.
examples.en: If we start discussing personal topics, we are going to go off track.

examples.es: El moderador intervino para que el equipo no pudiera desviarse del plan.
examples.en: The moderator intervened so the team would not go off track.

cards.example_sentence: We must not go off track during the results presentation.
cards.example_es: No debemos desviarnos del plan durante la presentación de resultados.
cards.example_en: We must not go off track during the results presentation.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a goat (go) sprinting off the track, abandoning the plan.

cards.definition_en: Requires further review or correction.

examples.es: El informe necesita revisión antes de enviarlo.
examples.en: The report needs revision before sending it.

examples.es: La propuesta de presupuesto necesita revisión por parte del departamento financiero.
examples.en: The budget proposal needs revision by the finance department.

examples.es: Su estrategia de marketing necesita revisión para alinearse con los objetivos trimestrales.
examples.en: Your marketing strategy needs revision to align with the quarterly goals.

cards.example_sentence: The report needs revision before sending it.
cards.example_es: El informe necesita revisión antes de enviarlo.
cards.example_en: The report needs revision before sending it.
cards.mnemonic_en: He needs a re‑vision, like a doctor checking his eyes again.

cards.definition_en: requiring immediate attention or action

examples.es: Necesito que me envíes el informe lo antes posible, es urgente.
examples.en: I need you to send me the report as soon as possible; it is urgent.

examples.es: Por favor, marca este correo como urgente para que el equipo lo vea de inmediato.
examples.en: Please mark this email as urgent so the team sees it right away.

examples.es: Tenemos una solicitud urgente del cliente y debemos resolverla antes de la reunión.
examples.en: We have an urgent request from the client and must resolve it before the meeting.

cards.example_sentence: I need you to send me the report as soon as possible; it is urgent.
cards.example_es: Necesito que me envíes el informe lo antes posible, es urgente.
cards.example_en: I need you to send me the report as soon as possible; it is urgent.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a fire alarm shouting 'Urgente!' demanding immediate action.

cards.definition_en: Something that is considered very important and should be dealt with before other matters.

examples.es: Este proyecto es de alta prioridad para la empresa.
examples.en: This project is of high priority for the company.

examples.es: Debido a la fecha límite, el informe del cliente tiene alta prioridad hoy.
examples.en: Due to the deadline, the client report has high priority today.

examples.es: Por favor, marca este correo electrónico como alta prioridad para que el equipo lo vea primero.
examples.en: Please mark this email as high priority so the team sees it first.

cards.example_sentence: This project is of high priority for the company.
cards.example_es: Este proyecto es de alta prioridad para la empresa.
cards.example_en: This project is of high priority for the company.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a tall (alta) priority banner flying high above the crowd

cards.definition_en: Something that is considered less important or urgent than other items.

examples.es: Este ticket tiene baja prioridad, así que podemos atenderlo más tarde.
examples.en: This ticket has low priority, so we can address it later.

examples.es: Debido a la falta de recursos, el proyecto se considera de baja prioridad por ahora.
examples.en: Due to the lack of resources, the project is considered low priority for now.

examples.es: Por favor, marca esta tarea como de baja prioridad en el sistema de gestión.
examples.en: Please mark this task as low priority in the management system.

cards.example_sentence: This ticket has low priority, so we can address it later.
cards.example_es: Este ticket tiene baja prioridad, así que podemos atenderlo más tarde.
cards.example_en: This ticket has low priority, so we can address it later.
cards.mnemonic_en: Think of a low (baja) priority task as a tiny flag at the bottom of the list.

cards.definition_en: A person or place that serves as the primary source of communication or information.

examples.es: Para cualquier duda, por favor contacte a María, quien será su punto de contacto.
examples.en: For any questions, please contact Maria, who will be your point of contact.

examples.es: El gerente de ventas es el punto de contacto principal para los nuevos clientes internacionales.
examples.en: The sales manager is the primary point of contact for new international clients.

examples.es: Necesitamos designar a un punto de contacto en el departamento de TI para coordinar la actualización del software.
examples.en: We need to appoint a point of contact in the IT department to coordinate the software update.

cards.example_sentence: For any questions, please contact Maria, who will be your point of contact.
cards.example_es: Para cualquier duda, por favor contacte a María, quien será su punto de contacto.
cards.example_en: For any questions, please contact Maria, who will be your point of contact.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a dot (punto) on a map marking the point of contact.

cards.definition_en: To display one's computer screen to others, typically during a video call or presentation.
collocations: share the screen with the team
share the screen during the meeting
share the screen for a presentation

examples.es: Necesito compartir pantalla durante la reunión.
examples.en: I need to share the screen during the meeting.

examples.es: Por favor, avísame cuando estés listo para compartir pantalla y mostrar los resultados.
examples.en: Please let me know when you are ready to share the screen and show the results.

examples.es: El presentador olvidó compartir pantalla antes de empezar su explicación.
examples.en: The presenter forgot to share the screen before starting his explanation.

cards.example_sentence: I need to share the screen during the meeting.
cards.example_es: Necesito compartir pantalla durante la reunión.
cards.example_en: I need to share the screen during the meeting.
cards.mnemonic_en: When you COMPARTIR pizza, you SHARE the SCREEN.

cards.definition_en: To turn off or lower the microphone's sound so it cannot be heard.
collocations: He forgot to mute the microphone

examples.es: Puedes silenciar el micrófono si no quieres que te escuchen.
examples.en: You can mute the microphone if you don't want to be heard.

examples.es: Por favor, recuerda silenciar el micrófono durante la presentación para evitar el ruido de fondo.
examples.en: Please remember to mute the microphone during the presentation to avoid background noise.

examples.es: El moderador tuvo que silenciar el micrófono del participante porque había mucha interferencia.
examples.en: The moderator had to mute the microphone of the participant because there was a lot of interference.

cards.example_sentence: You can mute the microphone if you don't want to be heard.
cards.example_es: Puedes silenciar el micrófono si no quieres que te escuchen.
cards.example_en: You can mute the microphone if you don't want to be heard.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a mute button pressing the mic, turning the micrófono into complete silence

cards.definition_en: To connect to or participate in a scheduled meeting.

examples.es: Por favor, haz clic en el enlace para conectarse a la reunión de equipo.
examples.en: Please click the link to join the meeting with the team.

examples.es: Si tienes problemas técnicos, intenta reiniciar tu computadora antes de conectarse a la reunión.
examples.en: If you have technical issues, try restarting your computer before you join the meeting.

examples.es: El gerente nos envió una invitación formal para conectarse a la reunión sobre el nuevo proyecto.
examples.en: The manager sent us a formal invitation to join the meeting about the new project.

cards.example_sentence: Please click the link to join the meeting with the team.
cards.example_es: Por favor, haz clic en el enlace para conectarse a la reunión de equipo.
cards.example_en: Please click the link to join the meeting with the team.
cards.mnemonic_en: Juan joins the meeting, just like connecting a plug to a socket.

cards.definition_en: To exit or depart from a meeting.
collocations: to leave the meeting without notice

examples.es: Voy a abandonar la reunión porque ya es tarde.
examples.en: I'm going to leave the meeting because it's getting late.

examples.es: Si tienes una emergencia, puedes abandonar la reunión sin pedir permiso.
examples.en: If you have an emergency, you can leave the meeting without asking for permission.

examples.es: El director decidió abandonar la reunión antes de que terminara la presentación.
examples.en: The director decided to leave the meeting before the presentation ended.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to leave the meeting because it's getting late.
cards.example_es: Voy a abandonar la reunión porque ya es tarde.
cards.example_en: I'm going to leave the meeting because it's getting late.
cards.mnemonic_en: A band on a reunion walks out, leaving the meeting.

cards.definition_en: To write down information for later reference.

examples.es: Durante la reunión, es importante tomar nota de los puntos clave que menciona el jefe.
examples.en: During the meeting, it is important to take notes of the key points the boss mentions.

examples.es: Si no puedes recordar todos los detalles de la presentación, será mejor tomar nota de lo más relevante.
examples.en: If you cannot remember all the details of the presentation, it would be better to take notes of the most relevant information.

examples.es: El cliente habló muy rápido, así que tuve que tomar nota de sus requisitos específicos para no olvidarlos.
examples.en: The client spoke very quickly, so I had to take notes of his specific requirements so I would not forget them.

cards.example_sentence: During the meeting, it is important to take notes of the key points the boss mentions.
cards.example_es: Durante la reunión, es importante tomar nota de los puntos clave que menciona el jefe.
cards.example_en: During the meeting, it is important to take notes of the key points the boss mentions.
cards.mnemonic_en: Take notes as you tomar a note from a bright red tomato.

cards.definition_en: To present a demonstration of something, typically showing how it works.
collocations: give a demo of the product
give a demo to the client
give a demo during the meeting

examples.es: Voy a hacer una demostración del nuevo software para el equipo.
examples.en: I'm going to give a demo of the new software to the team.

examples.es: El ingeniero va a hacer una demostración de cómo funciona el prototipo durante la reunión.
examples.en: The engineer is going to give a demo of how the prototype works during the meeting.

examples.es: Es necesario hacer una demostración de la aplicación antes de lanzarla al mercado.
examples.en: It is necessary to give a demo of the application before launching it to the market.

cards.example_sentence: I'm going to give a demo of the new software to the team.
cards.example_es: Voy a hacer una demostración del nuevo software para el equipo.
cards.example_en: I'm going to give a demo of the new software to the team.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture yourself handing a demo DVD to a crowd, showing exactly what a demostración means.

cards.definition_en: A set of actions or tasks that should be taken after the current point.

examples.es: Los próximos pasos son revisar el informe y presentar los resultados.
examples.en: The next steps are to review the report and present the results.

examples.es: Al finalizar la reunión, definiremos los próximos pasos para el lanzamiento del proyecto.
examples.en: At the end of the meeting, we will define the next steps for the project launch.

examples.es: Por favor, envíame un correo electrónico detallando los próximos pasos después de nuestra llamada.
examples.en: Please send me an email detailing the next steps after our call.

cards.example_sentence: The next steps are to review the report and present the results.
cards.example_es: Los próximos pasos son revisar el informe y presentar los resultados.
cards.example_en: The next steps are to review the report and present the results.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a NEXT sign pointing to a staircase of STEPS labeled PROXIMO, showing the upcoming steps.

cards.definition_en: A continuation or prolongation of something, especially a period of time.

examples.es: El equipo solicitó una prórroga para completar la auditoría trimestral.
examples.en: The team requested an extension to complete the quarterly audit.

examples.es: Solicitamos una prórroga para entregar el informe final del proyecto.
examples.en: We requested an extension to submit the final project report.

examples.es: El banco aprobó una prórroga en el plazo de pago del préstamo.
examples.en: The bank approved an extension on the loan repayment deadline.

cards.example_sentence: The team requested an extension to complete the quarterly audit.
cards.example_es: El equipo solicitó una prórroga para completar la auditoría trimestral.
cards.example_en: The team requested an extension to complete the quarterly audit.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a pro rope being pulled longer, turning into an extension.

cards.definition_en: A method for overcoming a problem or limitation in a system.

examples.es: Implementamos una solución alternativa mientras el equipo corrige el error.
examples.en: We implemented a workaround while the team fixes the bug.

examples.es: El software no permite exportar archivos, así que buscaremos una solución alternativa para terminar el reporte.
examples.en: The software does not allow exporting files, so we will look for a workaround to finish the report.

examples.es: Debido a las restricciones del sistema, tuvimos que crear una solución alternativa para procesar los pagos.
examples.en: Due to system restrictions, we had to create a workaround to process the payments.

cards.example_sentence: We implemented a workaround while the team fixes the bug.
cards.example_es: Implementamos una solución alternativa mientras el equipo corrige el error.
cards.example_en: We implemented a workaround while the team fixes the bug.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a worker circling a wall, using a solución alternativa to get the job done.

cards.definition_en: A person or thing that prevents progress or blocks something.

examples.es: El equipo técnico identificó un bloqueador que impide el despliegue de la nueva actualización.
examples.en: The technical team identified a blocker that is preventing the deployment of the new update.

examples.es: Durante la reunión, mencioné que la falta de presupuesto es el principal bloqueador para avanzar con el proyecto.
examples.en: During the meeting, I mentioned that the lack of budget is the main blocker to moving forward with the project.

examples.es: Necesitamos eliminar este bloqueador rápidamente para cumplir con la fecha de entrega establecida.
examples.en: We need to remove this blocker quickly to meet the established deadline.

cards.example_sentence: The technical team identified a blocker that is preventing the deployment of the new update.
cards.example_es: El equipo técnico identificó un bloqueador que impide el despliegue de la nueva actualización.
cards.example_en: The technical team identified a blocker that is preventing the deployment of the new update.
cards.mnemonic_en: A blocker stops traffic by dropping a giant block, just like a Spanish bloqueador.

cards.definition_en: The state of being ready for use right away.

examples.es: Tengo disponibilidad inmediata para comenzar a trabajar.
examples.en: I have immediate availability to start working.

examples.es: El candidato confirmó su disponibilidad inmediata para incorporarse al equipo de ventas el próximo lunes.
examples.en: The candidate confirmed his immediate availability to join the sales team next Monday.

examples.es: Por favor, indique en su solicitud si cuenta con disponibilidad inmediata para cubrir el puesto vacante.
examples.en: Please indicate in your application if you have immediate availability to fill the open position.

cards.example_sentence: I have immediate availability to start working.
cards.example_es: Tengo disponibilidad inmediata para comenzar a trabajar.
cards.example_en: I have immediate availability to start working.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a flashing billboard shouting Immediate availability, echoing the Spanish word 'inmediata' for instant.

cards.definition_en: A setting or system used to conduct testing of software or processes.

examples.es: El equipo configuró el entorno de pruebas antes de lanzar la nueva versión.
examples.en: The team set up the test environment before releasing the new version.

examples.es: Debemos verificar que los datos sean correctos en el entorno de pruebas antes de pasar a producción.
examples.en: We must verify that the data is correct in the test environment before moving to production.

examples.es: Los desarrolladores encontraron un error crítico mientras ejecutaban el código en el entorno de pruebas.
examples.en: The developers found a critical bug while running the code in the test environment.

cards.example_sentence: The team set up the test environment before releasing the new version.
cards.example_es: El equipo configuró el entorno de pruebas antes de lanzar la nueva versión.
cards.example_en: The team set up the test environment before releasing the new version.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a lab where every test has its own entorno sign, a test environment.

cards.definition_en: The setting where software or a system is operated for real users, as opposed to testing or development.

examples.es: El software se desplegó en el entorno de producción después de las pruebas.
examples.en: The software was deployed to the production environment after testing.

examples.es: Debemos evitar realizar cambios directos en el entorno de producción sin una revisión previa.
examples.en: We must avoid making direct changes to the production environment without prior review.

examples.es: El equipo técnico detectó un error crítico justo después de actualizar el entorno de producción.
examples.en: The technical team detected a critical bug right after updating the production environment.

cards.example_sentence: The software was deployed to the production environment after testing.
cards.example_es: El software se desplegó en el entorno de producción después de las pruebas.
cards.example_en: The software was deployed to the production environment after testing.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a factory (producción) inside a garden (entorno) to recall Production environment.

cards.definition_en: A sequence of individuals or steps required to give approval for a decision or document.

examples.es: Para el proyecto, seguimos una cadena de aprobación antes de lanzar el producto.
examples.en: For the project, we follow an approval chain before launching the product.

examples.es: El director de finanzas debe revisar los gastos si la cadena de aprobación es demasiado larga.
examples.en: The finance director must review the expenses if the approval chain is too long.

examples.es: Necesitamos simplificar nuestra cadena de aprobación para que los contratos se firmen más rápido.
examples.en: We need to simplify our approval chain so that contracts are signed faster.

cards.example_sentence: For the project, we follow an approval chain before launching the product.
cards.example_es: Para el proyecto, seguimos una cadena de aprobación antes de lanzar el producto.
cards.example_en: For the project, we follow an approval chain before launching the product.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a chain of stamps giving approval on a document.

title: Academic English
description: Upper-intermediate and advanced academic vocabulary for essays, reports, presentations, and formal discussion.

cards.definition_en: A proposed explanation for a phenomenon that can be tested through observation or experiment.

examples.es: Mi hipótesis es que el aumento de la temperatura afecta la migración de las aves.
examples.en: My hypothesis is that the rise in temperature affects bird migration.

examples.es: Los investigadores formularon una hipótesis para explicar los resultados inesperados del experimento.
examples.en: The researchers formulated a hypothesis to explain the unexpected results of the experiment.

examples.es: El equipo científico debe realizar más pruebas para confirmar su hipótesis inicial sobre la estructura celular.
examples.en: The scientific team must conduct further tests to confirm their initial hypothesis regarding the cellular structure.

cards.example_sentence: My hypothesis is that the rise in temperature affects bird migration.
cards.example_es: Mi hipótesis es que el aumento de la temperatura afecta la migración de las aves.
cards.example_en: My hypothesis is that the rise in temperature affects bird migration.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a hippo presenting a thesis on a lab table, the hippo's hypothesis.

cards.definition_en: A symbol or quantity that can change or take on different values.

examples.es: La temperatura es variable en esta región.
examples.en: The temperature is variable in this region.

cards.example_sentence: The temperature is variable in this region.
cards.example_es: La temperatura es variable en esta región.
cards.example_en: The temperature is variable in this region.

cards.definition_en: A systematic set of methods and principles used in a particular field of study or practice.

examples.es: La metodología que utilizó el investigador garantizó resultados fiables.
examples.en: The methodology the researcher used ensured reliable results.

examples.es: El comité académico cuestionó la metodología empleada en el estudio sobre el cambio climático.
examples.en: The academic committee questioned the methodology employed in the climate change study.

examples.es: Debemos detallar nuestra metodología en el primer capítulo de la tesis doctoral.
examples.en: We must detail our methodology in the first chapter of the doctoral thesis.

cards.example_sentence: The methodology the researcher used ensured reliable results.
cards.example_es: La metodología que utilizó el investigador garantizó resultados fiables.
cards.example_en: The methodology the researcher used ensured reliable results.
cards.mnemonic_en: Methodology sounds like Met a dog O' Lia, a methodical dog named Lia.

cards.definition_en: A comprehensive summary and analysis of existing research and publications on a particular topic.

examples.es: Para mi tesis, realicé una revisión bibliográfica exhaustiva de los estudios recientes.
examples.en: For my thesis, I conducted an exhaustive literature review of recent studies.

examples.es: El primer capítulo de su disertación doctoral consiste en una revisión bibliográfica sobre el impacto del cambio climático.
examples.en: The first chapter of her doctoral dissertation consists of a literature review on the impact of climate change.

examples.es: Antes de comenzar el experimento, el equipo publicó una revisión bibliográfica para identificar los vacíos en la investigación actual.
examples.en: Before starting the experiment, the team published a literature review to identify gaps in current research.

cards.example_sentence: For my thesis, I conducted an exhaustive literature review of recent studies.
cards.example_es: Para mi tesis, realicé una revisión bibliográfica exhaustiva de los estudios recientes.
cards.example_en: For my thesis, I conducted an exhaustive literature review of recent studies.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a librarian revising a mountain of books, doing a literature review.

cards.definition_en: A process in which experts evaluate each other's work, such as academic articles, to ensure quality and validity.

examples.es: La revisión por pares es esencial para garantizar la calidad de los artículos científicos.
examples.en: Peer review is essential to ensure the quality of scientific articles.

examples.es: El manuscrito fue aceptado para su publicación después de superar con éxito el proceso de revisión por pares.
examples.en: The manuscript was accepted for publication after successfully passing the peer review process.

examples.es: Los investigadores suelen recibir críticas constructivas de otros expertos durante la revisión por pares.
examples.en: Researchers often receive constructive criticism from other experts during peer review.

cards.example_sentence: Peer review is essential to ensure the quality of scientific articles.
cards.example_es: La revisión por pares es esencial para garantizar la calidad de los artículos científicos.
cards.example_en: Peer review is essential to ensure the quality of scientific articles.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a pair of peers hunched over a manuscript, doing a review.

cards.definition_en: Based on observation or experience rather than theory or pure logic.

examples.es: El método empírico se basa en la observación directa de los fenómenos.
examples.en: The empirical method relies on direct observation of phenomena.

examples.es: Los investigadores presentaron pruebas empíricas que respaldan su teoría sobre el cambio climático.
examples.en: The researchers presented empirical evidence to support their theory on climate change.

examples.es: Es necesario realizar un estudio empírico para validar los resultados obtenidos en el laboratorio.
examples.en: It is necessary to conduct an empirical study to validate the results obtained in the laboratory.

cards.example_sentence: The empirical method relies on direct observation of phenomena.
cards.example_es: El método empírico se basa en la observación directa de los fenómenos.
cards.example_en: The empirical method relies on direct observation of phenomena.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture an empire of test tubes, the empírico lab where evidence rules

cards.definition_en: relating to the qualities or characteristics of something rather than its quantity

examples.es: El estudio utilizó un enfoque cualitativo para comprender las experiencias de los pacientes.
examples.en: The study used a qualitative approach to understand patients' experiences.

examples.es: Los investigadores realizaron un análisis cualitativo de las entrevistas para identificar los temas recurrentes.
examples.en: The researchers performed a qualitative analysis of the interviews to identify recurring themes.

examples.es: La tesis doctoral incorpora datos de carácter cualitativo para profundizar en el impacto social del proyecto.
examples.en: The doctoral thesis incorporates qualitative data to delve into the social impact of the project.

cards.example_sentence: The study used a qualitative approach to understand patients' experiences.
cards.example_es: El estudio utilizó un enfoque cualitativo para comprender las experiencias de los pacientes.
cards.example_en: The study used a qualitative approach to understand patients' experiences.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a cup labeled cual measuring traits, that cup shows the qualitative data

cards.definition_en: Relating to, measuring, or expressed in terms of quantity.

examples.es: El análisis cuantitativo mostró un aumento del 15% en las ventas.
examples.en: The quantitative analysis showed a 15% increase in sales.

examples.es: Los investigadores prefieren un enfoque cuantitativo para medir la eficacia del nuevo fármaco.
examples.en: The researchers prefer a quantitative approach to measure the efficacy of the new drug.

examples.es: El estudio proporciona datos cuantitativos sobre el impacto del cambio climático en la agricultura local.
examples.en: The study provides quantitative data on the impact of climate change on local agriculture.

cards.example_sentence: The quantitative analysis showed a 15% increase in sales.
cards.example_es: El análisis cuantitativo mostró un aumento del 15% en las ventas.
cards.example_en: The quantitative analysis showed a 15% increase in sales.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a scientist counting cuántos beans, showing Quantitative data about how many.

cards.definition_en: The number of observations or items included in a statistical sample.

examples.es: El tamaño de la muestra debe ser suficientemente grande para obtener resultados fiables.
examples.en: The sample size must be large enough to obtain reliable results.

examples.es: Debido a que el tamaño de la muestra era demasiado pequeño, el estudio no pudo demostrar una correlación estadística significativa.
examples.en: Because the sample size was too small, the study failed to demonstrate a statistically significant correlation.

examples.es: Los investigadores decidieron aumentar el tamaño de la muestra para reducir el margen de error en la encuesta nacional.
examples.en: The researchers decided to increase the sample size to reduce the margin of error in the national survey.

cards.example_sentence: The sample size must be large enough to obtain reliable results.
cards.example_es: El tamaño de la muestra debe ser suficientemente grande para obtener resultados fiables.
cards.example_en: The sample size must be large enough to obtain reliable results.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a sample of soup the size of a giant 'tamaño' banner.

cards.definition_en: Results or conclusions drawn from an investigation or study.

examples.es: Los hallazgos del estudio sugieren que la dieta afecta la salud cardiovascular.
examples.en: The findings of the study suggest that diet affects cardiovascular health.

examples.es: El comité revisó los hallazgos de la investigación antes de publicar el informe final.
examples.en: The committee reviewed the research findings before publishing the final report.

examples.es: Debemos discutir los hallazgos inesperados que surgieron durante el experimento de laboratorio.
examples.en: We must discuss the unexpected findings that emerged during the laboratory experiment.

cards.example_sentence: The findings of the study suggest that diet affects cardiovascular health.
cards.example_es: Los hallazgos del estudio sugieren que la dieta afecta la salud cardiovascular.
cards.example_en: The findings of the study suggest that diet affects cardiovascular health.
cards.mnemonic_en: In a hall scientists discover findings like hidden treasures.

cards.definition_en: The possible results or effects that may follow from an action, decision, or event.

examples.es: Las implicaciones de su decisión se sentirán en toda la empresa.
examples.en: The implications of his decision will be felt throughout the company.

examples.es: El estudio analiza las implicaciones éticas del uso de inteligencia artificial en la medicina.
examples.en: The study analyzes the ethical implications of using artificial intelligence in medicine.

examples.es: Debemos considerar cuidadosamente todas las implicaciones económicas antes de aprobar este nuevo presupuesto.
examples.en: We must carefully consider all the economic implications before approving this new budget.

cards.example_sentence: The implications of his decision will be felt throughout the company.
cards.example_es: Las implicaciones de su decisión se sentirán en toda la empresa.
cards.example_en: The implications of his decision will be felt throughout the company.
cards.mnemonic_en: The imp's footprints spread, showing the implications of his mischief.

cards.definition_en: Restrictions or constraints that limit what can be done or achieved.

examples.es: Las limitaciones del nuevo software son evidentes en su rendimiento.
examples.en: The limitations of the new software are evident in its performance.

examples.es: El investigador reconoció las limitaciones de su metodología durante la presentación.
examples.en: The researcher acknowledged the limitations of his methodology during the presentation.

examples.es: Debido a las limitaciones presupuestarias, el proyecto no pudo completarse a tiempo.
examples.en: Due to budgetary limitations, the project could not be completed on time.

cards.example_sentence: The limitations of the new software are evident in its performance.
cards.example_es: Las limitaciones del nuevo software son evidentes en su rendimiento.
cards.example_en: The limitations of the new software are evident in its performance.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a line stopping cans labeled Limitaciones, the limit on the cans.

cards.definition_en: A set of concepts and theories that provides a basis for understanding and analyzing a particular research topic.

examples.es: El marco teórico del estudio se basa en teorías sociológicas contemporáneas.
examples.en: The theoretical framework of the study is based on contemporary sociological theories.

examples.es: Para desarrollar su tesis doctoral, el estudiante debe establecer primero un marco teórico sólido.
examples.en: To develop his doctoral thesis, the student must first establish a solid theoretical framework.

examples.es: La investigación analiza el fenómeno migratorio utilizando un marco teórico interdisciplinario.
examples.en: The research analyzes the migration phenomenon using an interdisciplinary theoretical framework.

cards.example_sentence: The theoretical framework of the study is based on contemporary sociological theories.
cards.example_es: El marco teórico del estudio se basa en teorías sociológicas contemporáneas.
cards.example_en: The theoretical framework of the study is based on contemporary sociological theories.
cards.mnemonic_en: Marco builds a theoretical framework like a picture frame for his ideas.

cards.definition_en: Research that has been conducted earlier on a given topic.

examples.es: La investigación previa sugiere que el método es efectivo.
examples.en: Previous research suggests that the method is effective.

examples.es: Debemos analizar la investigación previa antes de formular nuestra propia hipótesis.
examples.en: We must analyze previous research before formulating our own hypothesis.

examples.es: El artículo académico ignora gran parte de la investigación previa sobre el cambio climático.
examples.en: The academic paper ignores a large body of previous research regarding climate change.

cards.example_sentence: Previous research suggests that the method is effective.
cards.example_es: La investigación previa sugiere que el método es efectivo.
cards.example_en: Previous research suggests that the method is effective.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a scientist shouting Prev-ya as he opens an old research file

cards.definition_en: A collection of facts, testimony, or other information that together support a particular conclusion or argument.
collocations: the body of evidence points to
the body of evidence is compelling

examples.es: El cuerpo de evidencia presentado en el juicio fue suficiente para condenar al acusado.
examples.en: The body of evidence presented at the trial was sufficient to convict the defendant.

examples.es: Los investigadores han reunido un cuerpo de evidencia que respalda la teoría del cambio climático.
examples.en: Researchers have gathered a body of evidence that supports the theory of climate change.

examples.es: El comité médico revisó todo el cuerpo de evidencia antes de aprobar el nuevo fármaco experimental.
examples.en: The medical committee reviewed the entire body of evidence before approving the new experimental drug.

cards.example_sentence: The body of evidence presented at the trial was sufficient to convict the defendant.
cards.example_es: El cuerpo de evidencia presentado en el juicio fue suficiente para condenar al acusado.
cards.example_en: The body of evidence presented at the trial was sufficient to convict the defendant.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a cuerpo (body) stacked with piles of evidence.

cards.definition_en: A collection of data, typically organized for analysis or reference.

examples.es: El equipo de investigación analizó el conjunto de datos para identificar patrones en el comportamiento del consumidor.
examples.en: The research team analyzed the dataset to identify patterns in consumer behavior.

examples.es: Es necesario limpiar el conjunto de datos antes de proceder con el análisis estadístico del experimento.
examples.en: It is necessary to clean the dataset before proceeding with the statistical analysis of the experiment.

examples.es: El profesor compartió un conjunto de datos extenso con los estudiantes para que practicaran sus habilidades de programación.
examples.en: The professor shared an extensive dataset with the students so they could practice their programming skills.

cards.example_sentence: The research team analyzed the dataset to identify patterns in consumer behavior.
cards.example_es: El equipo de investigación analizó el conjunto de datos para identificar patrones en el comportamiento del consumidor.
cards.example_en: The research team analyzed the dataset to identify patterns in consumer behavior.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a set of datos stacked like books on a shelf.

cards.definition_en: To explain the meaning of something, or to understand and convey it in a particular way.

examples.es: El traductor debe interpretar el texto con precisión.
examples.en: The translator must interpret the text accurately.

examples.es: Los científicos intentan interpretar los datos obtenidos en el experimento.
examples.en: The scientists are trying to interpret the data obtained from the experiment.

examples.es: Es difícil interpretar el significado de este poema antiguo sin contexto histórico.
examples.en: It is difficult to interpret the meaning of this ancient poem without historical context.

cards.example_sentence: The translator must interpret the text accurately.
cards.example_es: El traductor debe interpretar el texto con precisión.
cards.example_en: The translator must interpret the text accurately.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a judge interpreting a tale, muttering inter‑pretty while opening a book titled interpretar.

cards.definition_en: To examine methodically by breaking something into its components and studying their relationships.

examples.es: Los científicos deben analizar los datos antes de publicar sus conclusiones.
examples.en: Scientists must analyze the data before publishing their conclusions.

examples.es: El comité se reunió para analizar las causas del fracaso del proyecto.
examples.en: The committee met to analyze the causes of the project's failure.

examples.es: Es necesario analizar el mercado financiero para tomar decisiones de inversión seguras.
examples.en: It is necessary to analyze the financial market to make secure investment decisions.

cards.example_sentence: Scientists must analyze the data before publishing their conclusions.
cards.example_es: Los científicos deben analizar los datos antes de publicar sus conclusiones.
cards.example_en: Scientists must analyze the data before publishing their conclusions.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a lab scientist saying analyze while reading the Spanish word analizar on a test tube label.

cards.definition_en: To combine different ideas, information, or substances into a unified whole.

examples.es: El químico logró sintetizar una nueva molécula en el laboratorio.
examples.en: The chemist managed to synthesize a new molecule in the lab.

examples.es: Los estudiantes deben sintetizar la información de varias fuentes para redactar su ensayo final.
examples.en: Students must synthesize information from several sources to write their final essay.

examples.es: El autor intenta sintetizar las teorías económicas más complejas en un solo capítulo introductorio.
examples.en: The author attempts to synthesize the most complex economic theories into a single introductory chapter.

cards.example_sentence: The chemist managed to synthesize a new molecule in the lab.
cards.example_es: El químico logró sintetizar una nueva molécula en el laboratorio.
cards.example_en: The chemist managed to synthesize a new molecule in the lab.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a chef shouting 'sin tetsar' as he blends ingredients to synthesize a new sauce.

cards.definition_en: To assess or judge the value, quality, or significance of something.

examples.es: El comité debe evaluar los resultados del experimento antes de publicar el informe.
examples.en: The committee must evaluate the experiment's results before publishing the report.

examples.es: Es necesario evaluar el impacto ambiental de este proyecto de construcción a largo plazo.
examples.en: It is necessary to evaluate the environmental impact of this construction project in the long term.

examples.es: Los profesores suelen evaluar la participación de los estudiantes durante los seminarios académicos.
examples.en: Professors typically evaluate student participation during academic seminars.

cards.example_sentence: The committee must evaluate the experiment's results before publishing the report.
cards.example_es: El comité debe evaluar los resultados del experimento antes de publicar el informe.
cards.example_en: The committee must evaluate the experiment's results before publishing the report.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a judge holding a scale saying eval uate while checking a Spanish evaluar exam.

cards.definition_en: A detailed analysis and assessment of something, especially a work of art, literature, or performance.

examples.es: El crítico decidió criticar la nueva película por su falta de originalidad.
examples.en: The critic decided to critique the new movie for its lack of originality.

examples.es: Los estudiantes deben criticar el artículo académico antes de presentar sus conclusiones en clase.
examples.en: Students must critique the academic article before presenting their findings in class.

examples.es: Es necesario criticar el diseño del experimento para identificar posibles sesgos en los resultados.
examples.en: It is necessary to critique the experimental design to identify potential biases in the results.

cards.example_sentence: The critic decided to critique the new movie for its lack of originality.
cards.example_es: El crítico decidió criticar la nueva película por su falta de originalidad.
cards.example_en: The critic decided to critique the new movie for its lack of originality.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a critic sipping tea, shouting critique as he points to a sign that reads criticar.

cards.definition_en: To give reasons for or against something, often in a discussion or debate.

examples.es: Es importante saber argumentar tus ideas durante el debate.
examples.en: It's important to know how to argue your ideas during the debate.

examples.es: El autor intenta argumentar que las políticas económicas actuales han exacerbado la desigualdad social.
examples.en: The author attempts to argue that current economic policies have exacerbated social inequality.

examples.es: El abogado intentó argumentar que el contrato original carecía de validez legal.
examples.en: The lawyer attempted to argue that the original contract lacked legal validity.

cards.example_sentence: It's important to know how to argue your ideas during the debate.
cards.example_es: Es importante saber argumentar tus ideas durante el debate.
cards.example_en: It's important to know how to argue your ideas during the debate.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a courtroom where the lawyer shouts argue like a fierce Spanish argumentar duel.

cards.definition_en: To show or prove something clearly by giving evidence, examples, or a practical display.

examples.es: El científico logró demostrar su teoría con los nuevos experimentos.
examples.en: The scientist managed to demonstrate his theory with the new experiments.

examples.es: Los estudiantes deben demostrar su comprensión del tema mediante un ensayo argumentativo.
examples.en: Students must demonstrate their understanding of the topic through an argumentative essay.

examples.es: La empresa utilizó datos estadísticos para demostrar la viabilidad del proyecto ante los inversores.
examples.en: The company used statistical data to demonstrate the project's viability to the investors.

cards.example_sentence: The scientist managed to demonstrate his theory with the new experiments.
cards.example_es: El científico logró demostrar su teoría con los nuevos experimentos.
cards.example_en: The scientist managed to demonstrate his theory with the new experiments.
cards.mnemonic_en: A demo show (demostrar) proves the product works, so you demonstrate it.

cards.definition_en: to explain or make something clear by using examples, pictures, or diagrams

examples.es: El profesor utilizó diagramas para ilustrar el concepto de energía cinética.
examples.en: The teacher used diagrams to illustrate the concept of kinetic energy.

examples.es: La autora incluyó varios estudios de caso para ilustrar los efectos de la inflación en la economía local.
examples.en: The author included several case studies to illustrate the effects of inflation on the local economy.

examples.es: El investigador presentó datos estadísticos para ilustrar la correlación entre el sueño y el rendimiento académico.
examples.en: The researcher presented statistical data to illustrate the correlation between sleep and academic performance.

cards.example_sentence: The teacher used diagrams to illustrate the concept of kinetic energy.
cards.example_es: El profesor utilizó diagramas para ilustrar el concepto de energía cinética.
cards.example_en: The teacher used diagrams to illustrate the concept of kinetic energy.
cards.mnemonic_en: I lustrate the picture, just like Ilustrar means to draw a clear image.

cards.definition_en: To provide reasons or arguments that show something is right or reasonable.

examples.es: Necesito justificar mi ausencia en la reunión con una nota médica.
examples.en: I need to justify my absence from the meeting with a medical note.

examples.es: El autor intenta justificar sus conclusiones mediante el análisis de datos estadísticos recientes.
examples.en: The author attempts to justify his conclusions through the analysis of recent statistical data.

examples.es: Es difícil justificar un gasto tan elevado sin presentar un presupuesto detallado.
examples.en: It is difficult to justify such a high expense without presenting a detailed budget.

cards.example_sentence: I need to justify my absence from the meeting with a medical note.
cards.example_es: Necesito justificar mi ausencia en la reunión con una nota médica.
cards.example_en: I need to justify my absence from the meeting with a medical note.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a judge justifying a case with a ruler while the word justificar rings in the courtroom.

cards.definition_en: To give assistance, encouragement, or approval to someone or something.

examples.es: Los datos estadísticos recopilados en el estudio sirven para respaldar la hipótesis principal del investigador.
examples.en: The statistical data collected in the study serve to support the researcher's main hypothesis.

examples.es: El profesor presentó pruebas documentales adicionales para respaldar su argumento durante el debate académico.
examples.en: The professor presented additional documentary evidence to support his argument during the academic debate.

examples.es: Es necesario citar fuentes bibliográficas confiables para respaldar las afirmaciones realizadas en el ensayo.
examples.en: It is necessary to cite reliable bibliographic sources to support the claims made in the essay.

cards.example_sentence: The statistical data collected in the study serve to support the researcher's main hypothesis.
cards.example_es: Los datos estadísticos recopilados en el estudio sirven para respaldar la hipótesis principal del investigador.
cards.example_en: The statistical data collected in the study serve to support the researcher's main hypothesis.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a strong support that backs you, like a Spanish 'respaldo' holding you up.

cards.definition_en: To assert the opposite of a statement or claim, thereby denying or opposing it.

examples.es: No deberías contradecir a tu jefe en público.
examples.en: You shouldn't contradict your boss in public.

examples.es: Los datos del estudio parecen contradecir las conclusiones iniciales del informe.
examples.en: The study data seem to contradict the initial findings of the report.

examples.es: Es arriesgado contradecir la teoría principal durante una presentación académica.
examples.en: It is risky to contradict the main theory during an academic presentation.

cards.example_sentence: You shouldn't contradict your boss in public.
cards.example_es: No deberías contradecir a tu jefe en público.
cards.example_en: You shouldn't contradict your boss in public.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a counter (contra) rolling a dice (dict) that says no, contradicting everything.

cards.definition_en: To ask about something in order to obtain information or to express doubt about it.

examples.es: No deberías cuestionar sus motivos sin conocer los hechos.
examples.en: You shouldn't question his motives without knowing the facts.

examples.es: Los científicos decidieron cuestionar la validez de los resultados obtenidos en el experimento.
examples.en: The scientists decided to question the validity of the results obtained in the experiment.

examples.es: Es necesario cuestionar las suposiciones tradicionales para fomentar la innovación en el sector.
examples.en: It is necessary to question traditional assumptions to foster innovation in the sector.

cards.example_sentence: You shouldn't question his motives without knowing the facts.
cards.example_es: No deberías cuestionar sus motivos sin conocer los hechos.
cards.example_en: You shouldn't question his motives without knowing the facts.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a pool cue asking a question, a cue-tion, echoing cuestionar

cards.definition_en: To express something again using different words, often to clarify or improve it.

examples.es: ¿Podrías reformular la pregunta para que sea más clara?
examples.en: Could you rephrase the question to make it clearer?

cards.example_sentence: Could you rephrase the question to make it clearer?
cards.example_es: ¿Podrías reformular la pregunta para que sea más clara?
cards.example_en: Could you rephrase the question to make it clearer?
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a writer re-phrasing a sentence, like a sculptor reformulating a clay statue.

cards.definition_en: To assert that something is true, typically without providing proof.

examples.es: El autor se atreve a afirmar en su tesis que el crecimiento económico no siempre garantiza el bienestar social.
examples.en: The author dares to claim in his thesis that economic growth does not always guarantee social welfare.

examples.es: Los investigadores se apresuraron a afirmar que los resultados preliminares del estudio son estadísticamente significativos.
examples.en: The researchers were quick to claim that the preliminary results of the study are statistically significant.

examples.es: Es difícil afirmar con certeza si el cambio climático es el único factor responsable de la sequía actual.
examples.en: It is difficult to claim with certainty whether climate change is the sole factor responsible for the current drought.

cards.example_sentence: The author dares to claim in his thesis that economic growth does not always guarantee social welfare.
cards.example_es: El autor se atreve a afirmar en su tesis que el crecimiento económico no siempre garantiza el bienestar social.
cards.example_en: The author dares to claim in his thesis that economic growth does not always guarantee social welfare.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a clay seal stamped with the Spanish word afirmar as you make a claim.

cards.definition_en: To propose an idea, plan, or course of action for consideration.

examples.es: El consultor se atrevió a sugerir una reestructuración completa del departamento para optimizar los resultados financieros.
examples.en: The consultant dared to suggest a complete restructuring of the department to optimize financial results.

examples.es: Durante la reunión, los expertos se reunieron para sugerir nuevas estrategias que mejoren la eficiencia del proyecto.
examples.en: During the meeting, the experts gathered to suggest new strategies that improve the project's efficiency.

examples.es: El comité de revisión va a sugerir cambios importantes en el manuscrito antes de su publicación final.
examples.en: The review committee is going to suggest significant changes to the manuscript before its final publication.

cards.example_sentence: The consultant dared to suggest a complete restructuring of the department to optimize financial results.
cards.example_es: El consultor se atrevió a sugerir una reestructuración completa del departamento para optimizar los resultados financieros.
cards.example_en: The consultant dared to suggest a complete restructuring of the department to optimize financial results.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a sugar jar that whispers suggestions.

cards.definition_en: To point out or show something, making it known.

examples.es: Por favor, señale la respuesta correcta en el examen.
examples.en: Please indicate the correct answer on the exam.

examples.es: Los datos del gráfico señalan una tendencia al alza en las ventas trimestrales.
examples.en: The data in the chart indicate an upward trend in quarterly sales.

examples.es: El autor debe señalar las limitaciones de su estudio en la sección de conclusiones.
examples.en: The author must indicate the limitations of their study in the conclusion section.

cards.example_sentence: Please indicate the correct answer on the exam.
cards.example_es: Por favor, señale la respuesta correcta en el examen.
cards.example_en: Please indicate the correct answer on the exam.
cards.mnemonic_en: I indicate by waving a bright señal like a signal flag

cards.definition_en: To emphasize or make something stand out.

examples.es: El informe debe destacar los resultados más importantes del experimento.
examples.en: The report must highlight the most important results of the experiment.

examples.es: La presentación busca destacar la necesidad urgente de implementar nuevas políticas ambientales.
examples.en: The presentation aims to highlight the urgent need to implement new environmental policies.

examples.es: El autor utiliza gráficos para destacar las tendencias de crecimiento en el mercado global.
examples.en: The author uses charts to highlight the growth trends in the global market.

cards.example_sentence: The report must highlight the most important results of the experiment.
cards.example_es: El informe debe destacar los resultados más importantes del experimento.
cards.example_en: The report must highlight the most important results of the experiment.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a high light shining on a star, making it destacar.

cards.definition_en: To give special importance or attention to something.

examples.es: El profesor quiso enfatizar la importancia de la puntualidad.
examples.en: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.

examples.es: El informe debe enfatizar los beneficios económicos del nuevo proyecto.
examples.en: The report must emphasize the economic benefits of the new project.

examples.es: La autora decidió enfatizar las diferencias culturales en su análisis sociológico.
examples.en: The author decided to emphasize the cultural differences in her sociological analysis.

cards.example_sentence: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.
cards.example_es: El profesor quiso enfatizar la importancia de la puntualidad.
cards.example_en: The teacher wanted to emphasize the importance of punctuality.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a teacher in a theater shouting 'ENFA' to emphasize the lesson.

cards.definition_en: As a result; therefore.
collocations: Consequently, we decided to cancel the event.

examples.es: En consecuencia, el proyecto fue cancelado.
examples.en: Consequently, the project was cancelled.

examples.es: No se realizaron las inversiones necesarias; en consecuencia, la empresa perdió su posición en el mercado.
examples.en: The necessary investments were not made; consequently, the company lost its market position.

examples.es: El estudiante no entregó el ensayo a tiempo y, en consecuencia, recibió una calificación reprobatoria.
examples.en: The student did not submit the essay on time and, consequently, received a failing grade.

cards.example_sentence: Consequently, the project was cancelled.
cards.example_es: En consecuencia, el proyecto fue cancelado.
cards.example_en: Consequently, the project was cancelled.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture dominoes, each consequence lands in (en) order—consequently.

cards.definition_en: It introduces a contrast or exception to what has just been said.

examples.es: El equipo realizó una investigación exhaustiva; sin embargo, no lograron encontrar evidencia suficiente para respaldar su hipótesis.
examples.en: The team conducted an exhaustive investigation; however, they failed to find sufficient evidence to support their hypothesis.

examples.es: Los datos sugieren una tendencia al alza en el consumo; sin embargo, las proyecciones para el próximo trimestre indican una posible desaceleración.
examples.en: The data suggests an upward trend in consumption; however, the projections for the next quarter indicate a possible slowdown.

examples.es: La política educativa ha mejorado el acceso a la formación técnica; sin embargo, todavía existen brechas significativas en la calidad de la enseñanza rural.
examples.en: The educational policy has improved access to technical training; however, significant gaps in the quality of rural instruction still persist.

cards.example_sentence: The team conducted an exhaustive investigation; however, they failed to find sufficient evidence to support their hypothesis.
cards.example_es: El equipo realizó una investigación exhaustiva; sin embargo, no lograron encontrar evidencia suficiente para respaldar su hipótesis.
cards.example_en: The team conducted an exhaustive investigation; however, they failed to find sufficient evidence to support their hypothesis.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a hay you VERify, though it's a sin embargo moment.

cards.definition_en: In addition; used to introduce an additional point.

examples.es: Además, los resultados preliminares indican una mejora sustancial en el rendimiento académico de los estudiantes.
examples.en: Furthermore, the preliminary results indicate a substantial improvement in student academic performance.

examples.es: Además, los datos recopilados durante el experimento demuestran una correlación significativa entre las variables.
examples.en: Furthermore, the data collected during the experiment demonstrate a significant correlation between the variables.

examples.es: Además, la implementación de esta nueva política reducirá los costos operativos a largo plazo.
examples.en: Furthermore, the implementation of this new policy will reduce operating costs in the long term.

cards.example_sentence: Furthermore, the preliminary results indicate a substantial improvement in student academic performance.
cards.example_es: Además, los resultados preliminares indican una mejora sustancial en el rendimiento académico de los estudiantes.
cards.example_en: Furthermore, the preliminary results indicate a substantial improvement in student academic performance.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine adding more items to a list, because "además" sounds like "add more" meaning furthermore.

cards.definition_en: In a contrasting or opposite manner, used to introduce a statement that reverses the previous one.
collocations: Conversely, if you increase the temperature, the pressure drops
Conversely, the results suggest a different trend

examples.es: No le gusta el café; por el contrario, prefiere el té.
examples.en: He doesn't like coffee; conversely, he prefers tea.

examples.es: El grupo de control mostró una mejora notable en el rendimiento académico; por el contrario, los estudiantes sin intervención no presentaron cambios significativos.
examples.en: The control group showed a notable improvement in academic performance; conversely, the students without intervention did not show any significant changes.

examples.es: Muchos expertos creen que la tecnología mejora la educación; por el contrario, otros argumentan que genera distracciones constantes.
examples.en: Many experts believe technology improves education; conversely, others argue that it creates constant distractions.

cards.example_sentence: He doesn't like coffee; conversely, he prefers tea.
cards.example_es: No le gusta el café; por el contrario, prefiere el té.
cards.example_en: He doesn't like coffee; conversely, he prefers tea.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a courtroom where the lawyer flips the script, shouting Por el contrario, and you answer Conversely like a mirror

cards.definition_en: In a similar way; in the same manner.

examples.es: Del mismo modo, los investigadores observaron que el uso de estrategias de aprendizaje activo fomenta una mayor participación de los estudiantes en el aula.
examples.en: Similarly, the researchers observed that the use of active learning strategies fosters greater student participation in the classroom.

examples.es: Del mismo modo, la reducción de los impuestos corporativos ha fomentado un crecimiento significativo en el sector manufacturero.
