cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a conflict as a door that enters the room, clashing with everything inside.

cards.definition_en: It means that something seems to be in conflict or inconsistent.
collocations: That appears contradictory to the earlier statement
That appears contradictory at first glance
That appears contradictory, but further analysis clarifies

examples.es: Parece contradictorio que la empresa promueva la sostenibilidad ambiental mientras utiliza envases de plástico de un solo uso en todos sus productos.
examples.en: That appears contradictory for the company to promote environmental sustainability while using single-use plastic packaging for all its products.

examples.es: Parece contradictorio que el gimnasio ofrezca clases de bienestar integral y al mismo tiempo venda bebidas azucaradas y comida ultraprocesada.
examples.en: That appears contradictory for the gym to offer holistic wellness classes while simultaneously selling sugary drinks and ultra-processed food.

examples.es: Defiendes la importancia de la puntualidad, pero siempre llegas tarde a las reuniones; parece contradictorio.
examples.en: You advocate for the importance of punctuality but always arrive late to meetings; That appears contradictory.

cards.example_sentence: That appears contradictory for the company to promote environmental sustainability while using single-use plastic packaging for all its products.
cards.example_es: Parece contradictorio que la empresa promueva la sostenibilidad ambiental mientras utiliza envases de plástico de un solo uso en todos sus productos.
cards.example_en: That appears contradictory for the company to promote environmental sustainability while using single-use plastic packaging for all its products.
cards.mnemonic_en: Visualize a billboard that appears, flashing the word 'contradictorio' in bright colors.

cards.spanish: No estoy cerrado a esa idea
cards.english: I am open to that idea
cards.definition_en: A statement indicating willingness to consider or accept a suggestion.
main_translations_es: No me opongo a esa idea

examples.es: No estoy cerrado a esa idea, aunque prefiero explorar otras opciones primero.
examples.en: I am open to that idea, although I prefer to explore other options first.

examples.es: Si quieres cambiar el horario de la reunión, no estoy cerrado a esa idea.
examples.en: If you want to change the meeting schedule, I am open to that idea.

examples.es: Aunque inicialmente dudaba sobre el teletrabajo, no estoy cerrado a esa idea si mantenemos las reuniones semanales.
examples.en: Although I was initially skeptical about remote work, I am open to that idea if we keep the weekly meetings.

cards.example_sentence: I am open to that idea, although I prefer to explore other options first.
cards.example_es: No estoy cerrado a esa idea, aunque prefiero explorar otras opciones primero.
cards.example_en: I am open to that idea, although I prefer to explore other options first.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a door swinging open as you say I am open to that idea, opposite of cerrado

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating readiness to think about something again.
collocations: I am willing to reconsider the proposal
I am willing to reconsider my decision
I am willing to reconsider the terms
I am willing to reconsider the offer

examples.es: Estoy dispuesto a reconsiderarlo si me presentas nuevos argumentos.
examples.en: I am willing to reconsider it if you present me with new arguments.

examples.es: Aunque mi postura inicial era firme, estoy dispuesto a reconsiderarlo tras escuchar tu propuesta.
examples.en: Although my initial stance was firm, I am willing to reconsider it after hearing your proposal.

examples.es: Si el presupuesto cambia, estoy dispuesto a reconsiderarlo para que el proyecto sea viable.
examples.en: If the budget changes, I am willing to reconsider it so that the project is viable.

cards.example_sentence: I am willing to reconsider it if you present me with new arguments.
cards.example_es: Estoy dispuesto a reconsiderarlo si me presentas nuevos argumentos.
cards.example_en: I am willing to reconsider it if you present me with new arguments.
cards.mnemonic_en: I'm willing to reconsider, like a Spanish dispuesto chef tasting a new recipe.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that something is arguable or not settled.

examples.es: La eficacia de esta nueva política económica es discutible, ya que muchos expertos dudan de sus resultados a largo plazo.
examples.en: The effectiveness of this new economic policy is open to debate, as many experts doubt its long-term results.

examples.es: Si el candidato realmente tiene la experiencia necesaria para el puesto es discutible, considerando su historial laboral reciente.
examples.en: Whether the candidate truly has the necessary experience for the position is open to debate, considering his recent work history.

examples.es: La idea de que la tecnología siempre mejora la calidad de vida es discutible, especialmente cuando observamos el impacto en la salud mental.
examples.en: The idea that technology always improves quality of life is open to debate, especially when we observe the impact on mental health.

cards.example_sentence: The effectiveness of this new economic policy is open to debate, as many experts doubt its long-term results.
cards.example_es: La eficacia de esta nueva política económica es discutible, ya que muchos expertos dudan de sus resultados a largo plazo.
cards.example_en: The effectiveness of this new economic policy is open to debate, as many experts doubt its long-term results.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a door labeled Debate swinging open, reminding you that discutible means open to debate.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that one is not completely convinced.
collocations: I am not fully persuaded by his argument
I am not fully persuaded yet
I am not fully persuaded about the decision

examples.es: No me convence del todo la teoría que presentaron en la conferencia.
examples.en: I am not fully persuaded by the theory presented at the conference.

examples.es: Aunque el plan de negocios parece sólido, no me convence del todo la estrategia de marketing propuesta.
examples.en: Although the business plan seems solid, I am not fully persuaded by the proposed marketing strategy.

examples.es: He escuchado sus argumentos sobre el cambio de horario, pero no me convence del todo su justificación.
examples.en: I have heard your arguments regarding the schedule change, but I am not fully persuaded by your justification.

cards.example_sentence: I am not fully persuaded by the theory presented at the conference.
cards.example_es: No me convence del todo la teoría que presentaron en la conferencia.
cards.example_en: I am not fully persuaded by the theory presented at the conference.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a con trying to convince me, but only half the story reaches me, so I'm not fully persuaded.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that someone's reasoning or evidence is solid and reliable.
collocations: Your argument is sound, so we can move forward
If your argument is sound, the conclusion follows
Your argument is sound and convincing

examples.es: Basado en la evidencia lógica que presentaste, tu argumento es sólido y difícil de refutar.
examples.en: Based on the logical evidence you presented, your argument is sound and difficult to refute.

examples.es: Aunque no estoy de acuerdo con tu conclusión, admito que tu argumento es sólido.
examples.en: Although I disagree with your conclusion, I admit that your argument is sound.

examples.es: Presentaste datos muy precisos y tu argumento es sólido frente a las críticas.
examples.en: You presented very precise data and your argument is sound in the face of criticism.

cards.example_sentence: Based on the logical evidence you presented, your argument is sound and difficult to refute.
cards.example_es: Basado en la evidencia lógica que presentaste, tu argumento es sólido y difícil de refutar.
cards.example_en: Based on the logical evidence you presented, your argument is sound and difficult to refute.
cards.mnemonic_en: A solid argument sounds like a sturdy drum echoing certainty

cards.definition_en: It means something is unsupported or has no basis.

examples.es: La acusación de que él robó el banco es infundada; eso carece de fundamento.
examples.en: The accusation that he stole the bank is unfounded; that lacks foundation.

examples.es: Tu teoría sobre el origen de los dinosaurios es pura especulación; eso carece de fundamento.
examples.en: Your theory about the origin of dinosaurs is pure speculation; that lacks foundation.

examples.es: Afirmar que la empresa va a quebrar mañana es alarmista; eso carece de fundamento.
examples.en: Claiming that the company will go bankrupt tomorrow is alarmist; that lacks foundation.

cards.example_sentence: The accusation that he stole the bank is unfounded; that lacks foundation.
cards.example_es: La acusación de que él robó el banco es infundada; eso carece de fundamento.
cards.example_en: The accusation that he stole the bank is unfounded; that lacks foundation.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a shaky house: that lacks foundation, just like a broken Spanish fundamento.

cards.english: That is not an inevitable conclusion
cards.definition_en: A statement asserting that a particular outcome is not unavoidable.
collocations: However, that is not an inevitable conclusion.
Thus, that is not an inevitable conclusion.
In any case, that is not an inevitable conclusion.

examples.es: No es una conclusión inevitable, pero debemos seguir investigando.
examples.en: That is not an inevitable conclusion, but we should keep investigating.

examples.es: Aunque los datos parecen claros, no es una conclusión inevitable para el equipo de expertos.
examples.en: Although the data seems clear, that is not an inevitable conclusion for the team of experts.

examples.es: Que el mercado esté saturado no significa que el fracaso sea seguro; no es una conclusión inevitable.
examples.en: Just because the market is saturated does not mean failure is certain; that is not an inevitable conclusion.

cards.example_sentence: That is not an inevitable conclusion, but we should keep investigating.
cards.example_es: No es una conclusión inevitable, pero debemos seguir investigando.
cards.example_en: That is not an inevitable conclusion, but we should keep investigating.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a nose shaking its head, saying that conclusion is not inevitable.
cloze_distractors_en: That is a completely verified fact
It is a significantly improved strategy
Those are the most predictable results

cards.english: There may be an alternative explanation
cards.definition_en: It suggests that an alternative explanation could exist.
main_translations_es: Existe la posibilidad de una explicación alternativa
collocations: Consider that there may be an alternative explanation
It's possible that there may be an alternative explanation
We should keep in mind there may be an alternative explanation

examples.es: Puede haber una explicación alternativa para el repentino descenso en las ventas.
examples.en: There may be an alternative explanation for the sudden drop in sales.

examples.es: Aunque los datos parecen claros, puede haber una explicación alternativa que no hemos considerado.
examples.en: Although the data seems clear, there may be an alternative explanation that we haven't considered.

examples.es: No saques conclusiones precipitadas; puede haber una explicación alternativa sobre por qué no llegó el correo.
examples.en: Don't jump to conclusions; there may be an alternative explanation as to why the email didn't arrive.

cards.example_sentence: There may be an alternative explanation for the sudden drop in sales.
cards.example_es: Puede haber una explicación alternativa para el repentino descenso en las ventas.
cards.example_en: There may be an alternative explanation for the sudden drop in sales.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a native altering the story while giving an explanation.

cards.english: I would put it this way
cards.definition_en: A phrase used to introduce a particular way of stating something.
collocations: I would put it this way: ...
Let me put it this way
I would put it this way, if you will
synonyms_en: I would phrase it like this
I would say it like this

examples.es: Lo dejaría en que el proyecto necesita más tiempo para ser exitoso.
examples.en: I would put it this way: the project needs more time to be successful.

examples.es: Sobre la decisión final, lo dejaría en que debemos esperar a los resultados.
examples.en: Regarding the final decision, I would put it this way: we must wait for the results.

examples.es: Si me preguntas por el problema, lo dejaría en que hubo una falta de comunicación.
examples.en: If you ask me about the problem, I would put it this way: there was a lack of communication.

cards.example_sentence: I would put it this way: the project needs more time to be successful.
cards.example_es: Lo dejaría en que el proyecto necesita más tiempo para ser exitoso.
cards.example_en: I would put it this way: the project needs more time to be successful.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a low jar where you put the idea, like saying 'I would put it this way'.

cards.spanish: Estoy de acuerdo en lo esencial
cards.definition_en: To express agreement with the general idea or underlying principle, without committing to all specifics.
main_translations_es: Estoy de acuerdo en lo fundamental
collocations: We can move forward; I agree in principle
I agree in principle with your suggestion

examples.es: Estoy de acuerdo en lo esencial, aunque algunos detalles pueden variar.
examples.en: I agree in principle, although some details may vary.

examples.es: Aunque el plan tiene algunos fallos, estoy de acuerdo en lo esencial sobre la estrategia general.
examples.en: While the plan has some flaws, I agree in principle with the overall strategy.

examples.es: La propuesta es interesante y estoy de acuerdo en lo esencial, pero necesitamos revisar el presupuesto.
examples.en: The proposal is interesting and I agree in principle, but we need to review the budget.

cards.example_sentence: I agree in principle, although some details may vary.
cards.example_es: Estoy de acuerdo en lo esencial, aunque algunos detalles pueden variar.
cards.example_en: I agree in principle, although some details may vary.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a principal (principle) shaking hands, saying I agree—like saying acuerdo in Spanish.

cards.spanish: No estoy en desacuerdo con eso
cards.english: I do not disagree with that
cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that the speaker does not oppose or contradict that.
collocations: I do not disagree with that point
I do not disagree with that view
I do not disagree with that statement
I do not disagree with that assessment

examples.es: Si el cliente insiste en cambiar el diseño, no estoy en desacuerdo con eso siempre que no afecte la fecha de entrega.
examples.en: If the client insists on changing the design, I do not disagree with that as long as it does not affect the delivery date.

examples.es: Aunque el plan tiene riesgos, no estoy en desacuerdo con eso si nos ayuda a reducir costos.
examples.en: Although the plan has risks, I do not disagree with that if it helps us reduce costs.

examples.es: Siendo honesto, no estoy en desacuerdo con eso, ya que los datos respaldan tu conclusión.
examples.en: To be honest, I do not disagree with that, since the data supports your conclusion.

cards.example_sentence: If the client insists on changing the design, I do not disagree with that as long as it does not affect the delivery date.
cards.example_es: Si el cliente insiste en cambiar el diseño, no estoy en desacuerdo con eso siempre que no afecte la fecha de entrega.
cards.example_en: If the client insists on changing the design, I do not disagree with that as long as it does not affect the delivery date.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine I tie a knot that refuses to split, so I do not disagree.

cards.definition_en: A statement indicating that something exactly constitutes the issue.
collocations: That's precisely the problem we face

examples.es: El equipo no logra ponerse de acuerdo sobre el presupuesto, y eso es justamente el problema que está retrasando el lanzamiento del proyecto.
examples.en: The team cannot agree on the budget, and that is precisely the problem delaying the project launch.

examples.es: El software se bloquea cada vez que intentamos exportar el archivo, y eso es justamente el problema que nos impide terminar el informe a tiempo.
examples.en: The software crashes every time we try to export the file, and that is precisely the problem preventing us from finishing the report on time.

examples.es: La falta de comunicación causa malentendidos; eso es justamente el problema en nuestra oficina.
examples.en: The lack of communication causes misunderstandings; that is precisely the problem in our office.

cards.example_sentence: The team cannot agree on the budget, and that is precisely the problem delaying the project launch.
cards.example_es: El equipo no logra ponerse de acuerdo sobre el presupuesto, y eso es justamente el problema que está retrasando el lanzamiento del proyecto.
cards.example_en: The team cannot agree on the budget, and that is precisely the problem delaying the project launch.
cards.mnemonic_en: Imagine a precise judge saying that is precisely the problem while holding a just scale

cards.spanish: Eso va al corazón del asunto
cards.english: That goes to the heart of the matter
cards.definition_en: It means that something addresses the most important or central point of an issue.
main_translations_es: Eso llega al meollo del asunto
Eso va al fondo del asunto
collocations: gets to the heart of the matter
goes straight to the heart of the matter
hits the heart of the matter
addresses the heart of the matter
synonyms_en: hits the nail on the head

examples.es: Tu análisis sobre la desigualdad económica es brillante, porque eso va al corazón del asunto.
examples.en: Your analysis of economic inequality is brilliant, because that goes to the heart of the matter.

examples.es: No perdamos tiempo con detalles técnicos; eso va al corazón del asunto de nuestra crisis actual.
examples.en: Let's not waste time on technical details; that goes to the heart of the matter regarding our current crisis.

examples.es: Al señalar que nuestro presupuesto no cubre los salarios, tu comentario va al corazón del asunto.
examples.en: By pointing out that our budget does not cover the salaries, your comment that goes to the heart of the matter.

cards.example_sentence: Your analysis of economic inequality is brilliant, because that goes to the heart of the matter.
cards.example_es: Tu análisis sobre la desigualdad económica es brillante, porque eso va al corazón del asunto.
cards.example_en: Your analysis of economic inequality is brilliant, because that goes to the heart of the matter.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a core (corazón) heart that slides straight into the matter
cloze_distractors_en: That walks around the edge of the table
That flies over the moon of the galaxy
That swims beneath the surface of the ocean
That dances across the floor of the room

cards.definition_en: It means something that provokes reflection or consideration.

examples.es: La cifra de desempleo juvenil que presentó el ministro da que pensar sobre la eficacia de nuestras políticas actuales.
examples.en: The youth unemployment figure presented by the minister gives food for thought regarding the effectiveness of our current policies.

examples.es: El documental sobre el impacto de la inteligencia artificial en el mercado laboral realmente da que pensar.
examples.en: The documentary about the impact of artificial intelligence on the job market really gives food for thought.

examples.es: Su propuesta de reducir la jornada laboral a cuatro días a la semana da que pensar sobre nuestra productividad.
examples.en: His proposal to reduce the work week to four days gives food for thought regarding our productivity.

cards.example_sentence: The youth unemployment figure presented by the minister gives food for thought regarding the effectiveness of our current policies.
cards.example_es: La cifra de desempleo juvenil que presentó el ministro da que pensar sobre la eficacia de nuestras políticas actuales.
cards.example_en: The youth unemployment figure presented by the minister gives food for thought regarding the effectiveness of our current policies.
cards.mnemonic_en: Picture a queue of pens serving tasty ideas on a plate
